allow: PowerShell(try { \(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { "gh not installed" })

Bash(BUNDLE=$\(curl -s "https://brandscape.media/" | grep -o 'assets/index-[^"]*\\.js' | head -1\); echo "bundle: $BUNDLE"; curl -s "https://brandscape.media/$BUNDLE" -o /tmp/live-bundle.js; echo "== URL literal\(s\) in bundle =="; grep -o '"https://ywwmchahqvqxzmcprdqy[^"]*"' /tmp/live-bundle.js | head -3; echo "== anon key literal present? =="; grep -o '"eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiI[^"]\\{0,40\\}' /tmp/live-bundle.js | head -3; echo "== any sb_publishable/sb_secret style key? =="; grep -o '"sb_[a-z]*_[^"]\\{0,20\\}' /tmp/live-bundle.js | head -3)

PowerShell(winget list --id PostgreSQL.PostgreSQL 2>&1; echo "---search---"; winget search PostgreSQL 2>&1; echo "---lmstudio check---"; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:1234/v1/models" -TimeoutSec 3 } catch { "LM Studio not reachable at 127.0.0.1:1234: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($html = \(curl.exe -s https://brandscape.media/\) -join "`n"; $js = \([regex]::Match\($html, 'assets/index-[\\w-]+\\.js'\)\).Value; $css = \([regex]::Match\($html, 'assets/index-[\\w-]+\\.css'\)\).Value; $bundle = \(curl.exe -s "https://brandscape.media/$js"\) -join "`n"; $style = \(curl.exe -s "https://brandscape.media/$css"\) -join "`n"; "js=$js css=$css"; "revising: " + $bundle.Contains\('AI IS REVISING'\); "presign: " + $bundle.Contains\('presign-upload'\); "storage_provider: " + $bundle.Contains\('storage_provider'\); "badge css: " + $style.Contains\('bs-badge-shimmer'\); "ghostline css: " + $style.Contains\('bs-ghost-line'\))
Bash(mkdir -p src/assets/partners && cp logo/companies/*.png src/assets/partners/ && ls -la src/assets/partners/)
Bash(git commit -m 'Admin AI playground, landing polish: logo marquee, count-up stats, typewriter window *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Media viewer lightbox in Library, video card previews, demo-mode previews from showcase, new showcase creatives *)
